settings.heading: What makes Factor greens different from other greens powders?

settings.text: Factor greens are formulated with science-backed ingredients at clinically effective doses. Unlike many greens powders that use proprietary blends, we're fully transparent about what's inside and how much of each ingredient you're getting. Every batch is third-party tested for purity and potency.

settings.heading: How should I take Factor greens?

settings.text: Simply mix one packet with 8–12 oz of cold water and shake or stir. Take it any time of day — morning, afternoon, or whenever fits your routine best.
Yes. Every batch of Factor greens is tested by independent, third-party labs for purity, potency, and safety — so you know exactly what you're getting.

settings.heading: Can I take Factor greens with other supplements?

settings.text: Factor greens can be taken alongside most supplements. However, if you are on medication or have specific health conditions, we recommend consulting with your healthcare provider first.

settings.heading: What is your return and refund policy?

settings.text: We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with your purchase, contact our support team for a full refund — no questions asked.
